svg.text: 100% Coverage Target | Security Best Practices | CI/CD Integration

g.text: NFR-001: 100% line coverage for all 4 services
NFR-002: All public functions have tests
Use known plaintext/ciphertext pairs for crypto validation
Tests MUST NOT log actual encryption keys to output
Verify key material is zeroed/cleared after use
NFR-007: No Sensitive Data in Output
No keys or PII appear in test logs or console
NFR-006: No real network or database calls in tests
SC-003: Zero sensitive data in logs
